div.h2: The Silent Killer: Premature Buffer Reuse in Async I/O

text.tspan: // ALWAYS wait for CQE before release
// Process data while buffer is still owned
// ALWAYS wait for CQE before release
// Process data while buffer is still owned
// BUG: buffer still referenced by kernel!
// If kernel writes after this release,
// it corrupts whoever got this buffer next.
// BUG: buffer still referenced by kernel!
// If kernel writes after this release,
// it corrupts whoever got this buffer next.
// buf returned to pool, state = FREE
// buf returned to pool, state = FREE
// DMA writes into buf - OVERWRITES NEW DATA!
// Result: write data corrupted by read data
// DMA writes into buf - OVERWRITES NEW DATA!
// Result: write data corrupted by read data
